description: The Law Enforcement Command of Iran (FARAJA, formerly NAJA) is the national police force of the Islamic Republic. Subordinate to the [Ministry of Interior](/orgs/ministry-of-interior), it is responsible for public security, border control, and crowd control. Under Commander-in-Chief [Ahmad-Reza Radan](/people/ahmad-reza-radan), police forces participated in the violent suppression of the [2025-2026 protests](/events/january-2026-massacres), using live ammunition and military-grade weapons against civilian demonstrators.
editorial_notes: Renamed from NAJA to FARAJA in 2021. Reports to Ministry of Interior but operationally takes orders from Supreme Leader.
